description: Verifier-quality classification for core benchmark inclusion decisions.

core_ready.label: core_ready
core_ready.description: Verifier has multiple assertion patterns, no existence-only checks, no fixed /tmp paths, and oracle coverage exists. Suitable for the canonical core benchmark.

conditional.label: conditional
conditional.description: Verifier has minor quality issues (e.g., single assertion pattern, missing oracle in R.4) but is functional for reward comparisons. Eligible for the core benchmark if it fills a critical gap.

extension_only.label: extension_only
extension_only.description: Verifier has significant quality issues: existence-only checks, fixed /tmp paths, brittle diff-only grading, or suite-level T.10 failures. Excluded from the canonical core benchmark until remediated.

from_abc_audit.description: Number of distinct assertion patterns in verifier. 1 pattern = weak.
Verifier only checks file existence, not content correctness.
Verifier uses fixed /tmp paths that can collide across runs.
Task lacks oracle/reference artifact for scoring validation.

additional_signals.description: Verifier relies solely on exact diff matching without semantic checks.
Verifier has only 1 assertion pattern (from O.e).

extension_only_triggers: T.9 WARN with existence-only verifier AND no other assertion patterns
conditional_triggers: O.e WARN with single assertion pattern only
rules.core_ready_default: Tasks without any WARN/FAIL on T.9, T.10, O.e, R.4 are core_ready by default.
